message:
chore(beads): export new findings from this session

`br sync --flush-only` export of beads created this session — issues
filed against newly identified bugs while reviewing the codebase:

- coding_agent_session_search-4xf7t — backup can raw-copy live WAL
  bundle after a busy VACUUM fallback (concurrency, P1).
- coding_agent_session_search-6bvx8 — update-check HTTPS override
  allow-list still accepts untrusted release-API hosts (security/
  update channel, P2).
- coding_agent_session_search-9cnv0 — pages config: extra warning
  terminator breaks compilation (build correctness, P1).
- coding_agent_session_search-dl9so — full rebuild can replace the
  canonical DB after a transient busy open (concurrency, P1).
- coding_agent_session_search-e34sr — non-watch indexing can leave
  WAL uncheckpointed after disabling autocheckpoint (correctness on
  shutdown, P2).
- coding_agent_session_search-rzd78 — `health: skip_db_open` still
  loads semantic context (resource use during health check, P1).

JSONL-only change; no DB schema or runtime change. The new beads
are filed for follow-up work and linked from this session via the
`br-###` thread convention in the body of any subsequent fixes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
